name: Plot Your Path
tagline: Make better career decisions with clarity and confidence.
shortDescription: Evaluate opportunities, prepare stronger applications, and build a purposeful career roadmap.
capabilities: Role fit and company desirability evaluation

hero.title: Make better career decisions with clarity and confidence.
hero.description: Plot Your Path helps you evaluate opportunities, prepare stronger applications, and build a purposeful career roadmap.

outcomes.kicker: What Plot Your Path helps you do
outcomes.title: Start with the decision, not the busywork.
items: Decide which roles are worth your time before you sink effort into them.
Reuse real experience in applications and interviews instead of rebuilding from memory.
Spot patterns in strengths, gaps, and outcomes that improve your next decision.
Build concrete plans to grow and improve in the areas you want to focus on.

loop.kicker: The path gets stronger as you use it
loop.title: This is not just a one-time application helper.
loop.description: Each part of the workflow feeds the next. The more clearly you capture opportunities, evidence, and outcomes, the easier it becomes to make stronger decisions later.

features.title: Core capabilities built around real career workflows.

items.title: Role capture and structuring
items.description: Turn pasted descriptions and captured opportunities into structured role records you can actually compare.

items.title: Evaluation support
items.description: Review fit, desirability, and key signals so you can focus on the opportunities that matter most.

items.title: Application and interview workflow
items.description: Keep relevant context, evidence, and preparation steps connected as you move through applications and interviews.

items.title: Evidence and skills visibility
items.description: Preserve reusable accomplishments, stories, and skill evidence so each future search starts stronger.

differentiators.title: Built to support judgment, reuse, and trust.

items.title: Decision support over simple tracking
items.description: Plot Your Path helps you judge where to focus, not just record what happened after the fact.

items.title: Structured career intelligence
items.description: It turns messy career activity into structured information that is easier to compare, revisit, and build on.

items.title: Reusable evidence capture
items.description: It preserves evidence you can reuse across roles, interviews, and future growth decisions.

items.title: Local-first trust
items.description: Your career data stays on your device by default, which supports trust without asking you to accept black-box handling.

gettingStarted.title: A simple first path into the app.
items: Paste a job description you're interested in into Roles.
Review the desirability of the company and the role.
Add your career experience in order to evaluated how each role matches your existings skills.
Prepare applications and interviews with relevant evidence close at hand.
Review in demand skills against your current strengths, and create plans to fill any gaps.

technicalDifferentiators.title: Readable product architecture, not engineering theater.
technicalDifferentiators.description: Plot Your Path is designed to be trustworthy in how it handles sensitive career data and useful in how it structures information for later reuse.
items: Browser-based and local-first by default, so your information stays with you unless you choose to export it.
Structured records and traceable context instead of opaque automation or one-shot prompts.
Built to support judgment and authorship rather than replace them with blind workflow automation.

currentStatus.heading: MVP / public preview
currentStatus.content: Plot Your Path is already useful for the core workflow, but it is still evolving. Expect steady refinement, clearer supporting materials, and stronger visualization over time.
